source_doc.title: A Policy on Geometric Design of Highways and Streets

rules.name: Lane Width - Rural Arterial (AASHTO)
rules.description: Travel lane width for rural arterials
rules.error_message: Lane width must be 11-12 ft for rural arterials per AASHTO

rules.name: Shoulder Width - Rural Arterial (AASHTO)
rules.description: Shoulder width for rural arterials with ADT > 2000
rules.error_message: Shoulder width should be 6-10 ft for rural arterials

rules.name: Lane Width - Freeway (AASHTO)
rules.description: Freeway lanes should be 12 ft wide
rules.error_message: Freeway lane width should be 12 ft per AASHTO

rules.name: Right Shoulder - Freeway (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum right shoulder width on freeways
rules.error_message: Right shoulder should be at least 10 ft on freeways

rules.name: Left Shoulder - Freeway (AASHTO)
rules.description: Minimum left (median) shoulder width on freeways
rules.error_message: Left shoulder should be at least 4 ft on freeways

rules.name: Maximum Grade - Freeway Level Terrain (AASHTO)
rules.description: Maximum grade for freeways in level terrain
rules.error_message: Freeway grade should not exceed 3% in level terrain

rules.name: Maximum Grade - Freeway Rolling Terrain (AASHTO)
rules.description: Maximum grade for freeways in rolling terrain
rules.error_message: Freeway grade should not exceed 4% in rolling terrain

rules.name: Maximum Grade - Freeway Mountainous (AASHTO)
rules.description: Maximum grade for freeways in mountainous terrain
rules.error_message: Freeway grade should not exceed 6% in mountainous terrain

rules.name: Maximum Grade - Arterial Level Terrain (AASHTO)
rules.description: Maximum grade for arterials in level terrain
rules.error_message: Arterial grade should not exceed 5% in level terrain

rules.name: Maximum Grade - Arterial Rolling Terrain (AASHTO)
rules.description: Maximum grade for arterials in rolling terrain
rules.error_message: Arterial grade should not exceed 6% in rolling terrain

rules.name: Maximum Grade - Arterial Mountainous (AASHTO)
rules.description: Maximum grade for arterials in mountainous terrain
rules.error_message: Arterial grade should not exceed 8% in mountainous terrain

rules.name: Maximum Superelevation - Open Area (AASHTO)
rules.description: Maximum superelevation rate in open (non-urban) areas
rules.error_message: Superelevation should not exceed 8% in open areas

rules.name: Maximum Superelevation - Urban Area (AASHTO)
rules.description: Maximum superelevation rate in urban areas (4-6% typical)
rules.error_message: Superelevation typically should not exceed 6% in urban areas

rules.name: Design Speed vs Posted Speed (AASHTO)
rules.description: Design speed should equal or exceed posted speed limit
rules.error_message: Design speed should be at least equal to posted speed limit
